title: Risograph Pulp
summary: Duotone risograph print on bone paper: fluorescent pink + powder blue, off-register hairlines, halftone ornament. Pane groups Sites, Inspect (Files+Blueprint), Runtime (DB+Logs).
flow: Locked v7 #010 IA — left rail with 3 grouped docks; Inspect groups Files+Blueprint, Runtime groups Database+Logs.
